overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: III The Empress · X Wheel of Fortune

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: X. Wheel of Fortune
related.teaser: The Wheel turns eternal — fortune rising and falling, hub of cosmic cycles.

related.name: Jade
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ᚹ Wunjo
related.teaser: Wunjo is the festival wind — laughter that tunes a village into one note.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Five of Swords
related.teaser: Five of Swords is the blade of air — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Six of Swords
related.teaser: Six of Swords is the blade of air — Reciprocity and grace; the current flows.

related.name: Ten of Swords
related.teaser: Ten of Swords is the blade of air — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.
